
### local pattern predictor (incomplete) 

 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-local-pattern-predictor-incomplete.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-local-pattern-predictor-incomplete.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-local-pattern-predictor-incomplete.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-local-pattern-predictor-incomplete.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-local-pattern-predictor-incomplete.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-local-pattern-predictor-incomplete.figure-6.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=6}


:::


### recent pattern to prediction?  {.smaller}


* easy cases:
* just saw TTTTTT: predict T
* just saw NNNNNN: predict N
* just saw TNTNTN: predict T 
<hr class="vspace" />
* hard cases:
* TTNTTTT 

   * predict T? loop with many iterations (NTTTTTTTNTTTTTTTNTTTTTT…)
   * predict T? if statement mostly taken (TTTTNTTNTTTTTTTTTTNTTTT…)
   * predict N? loop with 5 iterations  (NTTTTNTTTTNTTTTNTTTTNTT…)

* (many more)


### history of history 

 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-history-of-history.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-history-of-history.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-history-of-history.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-history-of-history.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-history-of-history.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-history-of-history.figure-6.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=6}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-history-of-history.figure-7.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=7}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-history-of-history.figure-8.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=8}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-history-of-history.figure-9.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=9}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-history-of-history.figure-10.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=10}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-pattern-predict-history-of-history.figure-11.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=11}


:::
